UserProfile.title: UserProfile

JobSource.title: JobSource

url.description: The URL of the job board or careers page

found_at.description: When the job was first discovered

is_recommendation.description: Whether this job was a discovery recommendation

is_broken.description: Whether the job link is currently unreachable
